summary: Comprehensive audit of VanaLedger app after Programsâ†’Projects and Claimsâ†’Activities refactoring. Backend 100% pass (37/37). Frontend has 1 CRITICAL bug (Add Farmer always disabled), plus multiple stale-terminology and pagination/search bugs.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Submit button ALWAYS disabled when using PhoneInput with +91 country code. validatePhoneNumber() strips non-digits from '+919876543210' = '919876543210' (12 digits), fails the digits.length===10 check. Farmers CANNOT be added via UI. Fix: in FarmersPage.js validatePhoneNumber(), strip country code before counting digits.

Each project card stat label shows 'Claims' instead of 'Activities'. Line 146 in ProjectsPage.js:

Claims
Subtitle shows '10 farmers enrolled across 4 projects' (uses farmers.length = current page = 10) instead of '65 farmers enrolled'. Should use totalCount state variable.

Search is applied client-side only on current page's 10 farmers. Searching for a farmer on another page returns 0 results. Pagination still shows 'Page 1 of 7' even when search returns 0 rows. The backend supports server-side search but FarmersPage doesn't pass search param to API.

Project filter is applied client-side on current 10 farmers only. Shows 3 rows when filtering by a project that has 18+ farmers. Pagination doesn't update when filtering. fetchData() doesn't pass project_id to backend.

Only 5 export cards shown. Requirements specify 6 buttons including Payout CSV. Payout CSV (/api/export/payout-csv) exists in backend but is NOT listed in ExportPage.js exports array. It's only accessible from the Ledger page Export CSV button.
Farmer dropdown in 'Add Activity' dialog shows only 10 options (first page of paginated API). FarmersPage.js:44 calls /api/farmers without page_size override. All 65 farmers should be available.

Left panel: 'Manage tree plantation programs, onboard farmers, track claims...' - should use 'projects' and 'activities'. Right panel subtitle: 'Sign in to manage your tree plantation programs.' - should say 'projects'.
'Estimates only. Actual issuance and payout depend on monitoring, verification, and program rules.' - uses old term 'program rules', should say 'project rules'.
Empty state message says 'No ledger entries yet. Approve claims to see payouts.' - old terminology. Should say 'Approve activities'.
Log Issuance button missing data-testid attribute (data-testid=None). Credit cards missing data-testid. Status Update dialog missing data-testid. Makes automated testing harder.
Issuance Date (Credits page) and Date Planted (Verification page) use browser's native date picker (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of shadcn calendar component. Inconsistent UI.

integration_issues.issue: Due to PhoneInput country code (+91) prefix, validatePhoneNumber always returns false for valid Indian numbers. Farmer addition is completely broken in the UI.

Search and project filter are client-side on current page only. With 65 farmers across 7 pages, only farmers on the current loaded page can be searched/filtered. fetchData() needs to pass search + project_id to backend API.

issues: Each card shows 'Claims' label instead of 'Activities' - stale terminology after renaming
Left panel body text and right panel subtitle still use 'programs' and 'claims' (old terminology)

action_items: CRITICAL FIX: FarmersPage.js validatePhoneNumber() - strip country code before digit count. Change: const digits = phone.replace(/[^\d]/g, ''); to account for +91 prefix (e.g., check last 10 digits or strip +91 first)
HIGH: ProjectsPage.js line 146 - change label 'Claims' to 'Activities'
HIGH: FarmersPage.js line 139 - change {farmers.length} to {totalCount} in subtitle
HIGH: FarmersPage.js - make search and project filter server-side (pass search+project_id to API), or at minimum load all farmers without pagination for filtering
HIGH: ExportPage.js - add Payout CSV export card to the exports array (endpoint: /export/payout-csv)
HIGH: VerificationPage.js line 44 - fetch all farmers for dropdown: change /farmers to /farmers?page_size=1000 or use a separate dedicated endpoint
MEDIUM: LoginPage.js - update text from 'programs'/'claims' to 'projects'/'activities'
MEDIUM: FarmersPage.js disclaimer - change 'program rules' to 'project rules'
MEDIUM: LedgerPage.js - change 'Approve claims' empty state text to 'Approve activities'
LOW: CreditsPage.js - add data-testid to Log Issuance button and credit cards
LOW: Consider replacing native date picker with shadcn calendar in CreditsPage and VerificationPage
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: PhoneInput produces '+91XXXXXXXXXX' (12 digits) but validatePhoneNumber checks for exactly 10 digits after stripping non-digits. This permanently disables the Add Farmer submit button. Root fix: `const digits = phone.replace(/^\+\d{1,3}/, '').replace(/[^\d]/g, '');`
HIGH: FarmersPage search+filter work purely client-side on 10 fetched items per page. Total count stays at 65 when filtered to 0. fetchData should accept and forward search/filter params to backend.
MEDIUM: VerificationPage fetches /api/farmers with default page_size=10. For 65 farmers only 10 appear in Add Activity dropdown. Should use page_size=1000 or dedicated unpaginated endpoint.
LOW: VerificationPage.js line 234 has typo comment {/* Disactivityer */} - clearly a renamed 'Disclaimer' comment from the Claimsâ†’Activities refactoring

success_rate.frontend: 60% (Loginâś“, Dashboardâś“, Projects partial (label bug), Farmers partial (subtitle/search/filter bugs, CRITICAL add farmer broken), Verification partial (farmer dropdown incomplete), Creditsâś“, Ledgerâś“, Exports partial (missing Payout CSV card), Sidebarâś“)

seed_data_creation: None created - using existing seeded data: 4 projects, 65 farmers, 227 activities, 4 credits
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs pass. Critical frontend bug: Add Farmer always disabled due to phone validation mismatch with PhoneInput component. Projects page shows 'Claims' instead of 'Activities'. Farmers subtitle shows wrong count (10 vs 65). Search/filter client-side only. Export page missing Payout CSV card. Verification farmer dropdown only 10 of 65 farmers.

add_farmer_broken.description: PhoneInput stores full value as countryCode+number (e.g., '+919876543210'). FarmersPage.validatePhoneNumber strips all non-digits giving '919876543210' (12 digits). Check is digits.length===10 â†’ always false for +91. Submit button disabled. Farmer cannot be created.
add_farmer_broken.fix: Change validatePhoneNumber to extract only the number part after country code. E.g.: const digits = phone.replace(/^\+\d{1,3}/, '').replace(/[^\d]/g, ''); return digits.length === 10;

claims_label_on_projects.description: ProjectsPage.js was partially refactored - activities_count field was renamed but the UI label on line 146 still reads 'Claims'.
claims_label_on_projects.fix: Change 'Claims' to 'Activities' in the stat label
